nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.id: loc-格德潘拉貢山國家公園-d36dc69a
nodes.name: 格德潘拉貢山國家公園
nodes.summary: 格德潘拉貢山國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括短尾绿鹊，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 非法贸易
nodes.summary: 为宠物或展示用途进行非法捕捉与交易。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 短尾绿鹊
nodes.summary: 短尾绿鹊（Javan green magpie，学名 Cissa thalassina），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于默拉皮火山、哈利蒙薩拉克山國家公園、格德潘拉貢山國家公園，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法贸易。
locations: 哈利蒙薩拉克山國家公園
格德潘拉貢山國家公園

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Javan green magpie is restricted to a small range in western Java, where it has been recorded in Mount Merapi National Park, Mount Halimun Salak National Park, Mount Gede Pangrango National Park and South Parahyangan Practice Forest and Nature Reserve. These areas are located predominantly in montane forests and foothills at elevations between

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This critically endangered species was once more widespread, but it has suffered significant population declines due to habitat loss and illegal capture for the wild animal trade

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This illegal trade has contributed to a severe population decline. In response, conservation efforts are being made to protect the species
